title: Pin Context Summary Under Input

findings.description: No context summary or pin feature visible near the chat input. The input toolbar has: project selector, '+' button, model selector (Sonnet 4.6), microphone button, and send button. No pinned context indicator.
findings.expected: A pinned context summary area below or near the chat input showing relevant context.
findings.actual: Input toolbar shows project/model selectors only. No context pin or summary feature.

verdict: Feature not implemented. No context pinning UI near the chat input.
